job_title: Software Engineer III - Full Stack Cloud (Java, React, AWS, GraphQL)
job_nlp_title: Software Engineer III - Full Stack Cloud
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Java, Object-oriented programming, TypeScript, React.js, NodeJS
skill_match_scores: Java:1.0, Object-oriented programming:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, React.js:1.0, NodeJS:0.5
must_have_quals: Formal training or certification on software engineering concepts and 3+ years applied experience, Strong proficiency in Java and object-oriented programming, Proficiency in front-end development using TypeScript, React.js and NodeJS, Experience with AWS services, specifically EKS (Elastic Kubernetes Service) and ECS (Elastic Container Service), Experience with infrastructure as code using Terraform, Experience developing and consuming GraphQL APIs, Familiarity with RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and cloud-native development, Experience with CI/CD tools and processes, Excellent problem-solving and communication skills, Overall knowledge of the Software Development Life Cycle
preferred_quals: Experience with other AWS services (e.g., Lambda, S3, RDS), Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and orchestration (Kubernetes), Knowledge of testing frameworks and tools (JUnit, Jest, etc.), Familiarity with AI development tools such as GitHub Copilot and Codeium, Experience with Agile methodologies, Contributions to open-source projects or technical communities, Experience working on platforms for external clients, especially in the commercial real estate or financial services domain
core_responsibilities: Executes software solutions, design, development, and technical troubleshooting with ability to think beyond routine or conventional approaches to build solutions or break down technical problems, Design, develop, and maintain full stack web applications using Java, TypeScript, React.js, and NodeJS, Build and deploy cloud-native applications on AWS, with a focus on EKS (Elastic Kubernetes Service) or ECS (Elastic Container Service), Partner with UX designers to implement intuitive user interfaces that align with design systems, Develop and maintain infrastructure as code using Terraform to ensure consistent, repeatable deployments and implement and optimize GraphQL APIs for efficient data access and integration, Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and deliver new features for external clients, Creates secure and high-quality production code and maintains algorithms that run synchronously with appropriate systems, Implement CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Spinnaker for automated integration, testing, and deployment, Ensure application security, scalability, and reliability in cloud environments, Contributes to software engineering communities of practice and events that explore new and emerging technologies
job_summary: JPMorgan Chase is one of the oldest financial institutions, offering innovative financial solutions. The Software Engineer III - Full Stack Cloud role involves designing and delivering technology products while executing critical technology solutions across various business functions.
